source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A 10-m-high cylinder, with a cross-sectional area of 0.1 m^2, has a massless piston at the bottom with water at 20\circ\text{C} on top of it. Air at 300 K, with a volume of 0.3 m^3, under the piston is heated so that the piston moves up, spilling the water out over the side. Find the total heat transfer to the air when all the water has been pushed out.

normalization_record.normalized_question_text: A 10-m-high cylinder, with a cross-sectional area of 0.1 m^2, has a massless piston at the bottom with water at 20\circ\text{C} on top of it. Air at 300 K, with a volume of 0.3 m^3, under the piston is heated so that the piston moves up, spilling the water out over the side. Find the total heat transfer to the air when all the water has been pushed out.
